faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Douglaston typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most homeowners notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 2-3 weeks as our treatments target adult fleas, larvae, and eggs throughout their lifecycle. We recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours while products dry. Our technicians provide specific safety instructions based on the treatment method used in your home.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Douglaston and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. Fleas multiply rapidly, so we prioritize quick response times to prevent infestations from worsening. Call us before noon for potential same-day service availability.
